statement.markdown: Given a string `word`, insert it into a Trie data structure. If the word already exists in the Trie, return `true`. Otherwise, return `false`.
statement.outputFormat: A boolean indicating whether the word was inserted or already exists
statement.notes: The Trie is initially empty, so a new node is created when the word is inserted

constraints.description: Word to be inserted or searched in Trie

examples.explanation: Word 'apple' is already in Trie, so return false
Word 'banana' is a new word, so insert into Trie and return true

hints.text: Check the implementation of the insert function
